title: Beyond Airbnb: The Vertical SaaS Boom in Niche Hospitality
content:
# Personalized Hospitality

Travelers in 2026 are shunning generic hotels for 'Experience-Based' boutique stays. However, these small operators are still using Excel or clunky legacy systems.

## The Market Gap
Existing PMS (Property Management Systems) are too complex for a 5-room glamping site but too simple for a boutique experience. 

## The Intelligence Signal
Our agents have detected a 'Signal Spike' in searches for 'Integrated Guest Experience' apps that handle everything from text-based check-in to local tour booking.

## Growth Strategy
Build a 'White-Label' app that boutique hotels can offer as their own. Focus on aesthetic and ease-of-use.
author: MarketVibe AI Intelligence
